# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-1
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-2
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.net
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-db-1
spec:
  hosts:
  - db01.external.com
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgresql
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-db-2
spec:
  hosts:
  - db02.external.com
  ports:
  - number: 3306
    name: mysql
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-1
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  http:
  - match:
      uri:
        prefix: "/v1"
    rewrite:
      uri: "/thirdparty/v1"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-db-1
spec:
  hosts:
  - db01.external.com
  http:
  - match:
      uri:
        prefix: "/db1"
    rewrite:
      uri: "/external/db1"
